title: GDI Integrated Facility Services taken private in C$861M transaction
content:
## GDI Integrated Facility Services taken private in C$861M transaction
On March 2, 2026, GDI Integrated Facility Services Inc. (“GDI”) completed its plan of arrangement with a purchaser affiliated with Birch Hill Equity Partners Management Inc. (“Birch Hill”) and Gestion Claude Bigras Inc. (“GCB”). The purchaser acquired all outstanding subordinate voting shares not owned by Birch Hill for C$36.60 per share in cash. As a result, GDI became a wholly owned subsidiary of the Purchaser.
GDI’s subordinate voting shares are expected to be de‑listed from the Toronto Stock Exchange on March 3, 2026, and GDI will apply to cease being a reporting issuer in Canada.
McCarthy Tétrault LLP represented the Special Committee of the Board of Directors of GDI, with a team led by Clemens Mayr that included Laura Fabi (Business Law).
